## ❓ Question

What would you like to know?

## 🔍 What I've Tried

Describe what you've already tried or looked into.

## 📚 Relevant Documentation

Have you checked the README or other documentation? What did you find?

## 💡 Expected Answer

What kind of answer are you looking for?
- [ ] How to do something
- [ ] Why something works a certain way
- [ ] Best practices
- [ ] Clarification on documentation
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## 🎯 Context

Provide any relevant context about your question:
- What are you trying to accomplish?
- Are you using NZXT-ESC in a specific way?
- Any constraints or requirements?

## 📝 Additional Information

Add any other information that might help answer your question.

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have read the README
- [ ] I have searched existing issues and discussions
- [ ] I have provided relevant context
